package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "math/rand"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `fmt.Sprintf("%+v", user)` or `fmt.Printf("%v", config)` on structs that contain password/secret/token fields
type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructModel
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructService struct {
    repo *CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveFmtPrintOfSensitiveStruct(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructDTO) error {
    focus := "fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct"
    _ = focus
    type User struct {
        ID       string
        Password string
        Secret   string
    }
    u := User{ID: input, Password: "secret123", Secret: "token"}
    log.Printf("user: %+v", u)
    c.String(500, fmt.Sprintf("failure: %v", u))
    fmt_print_sensitive_struct_positive := map[string]int{"fmt": 1, "print": 2, "sensitive": 3, "struct": 4}
    fmt_print_sensitive_struct_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    fmt_positive_0 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_positive["fmt"] + len(input)
    _ = fmt_positive_0
    print_positive_1 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_positive["print"] + len(input)
    _ = print_positive_1
    sensitive_positive_2 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_positive["sensitive"] + len(input)
    _ = sensitive_positive_2
    struct_positive_3 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_positive["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_positive_3
    return nil
}
